title: Aurora Cannabis Fiscal 2026 Q2 Results Summary
text: Aurora Cannabis reported strong second-quarter fiscal 2026 results for period ending September 30, 2025. Revenue and profitability: Total net revenue $90.4 million (11% YoY increase), Global medical cannabis revenue $70.5 million (15% YoY growth, record level), International medical cannabis revenue $42.7 million (22% YoY increase), Adjusted EBITDA $15.4 million (52% YoY growth), Adjusted net income $7.1 million (135% YoY increase). Margins: Consolidated adjusted gross margin 61% (vs. 54% prior year), Medical cannabis adjusted gross margin 69% (vs. 68% prior year). Balance sheet: Cash $141.9 million, Debt-free cannabis business (only non-recourse debt relates to Bevo Farms). CEO Miguel Martin stated: Aurora's quarterly performance highlights our continued focus on profitable growth. We achieved record net revenue for global medical cannabis representing 15% year-over-year increase, while adjusted EBITDA rose 52%. Q3 2026 guidance: Expect consolidated net revenue growth YoY. Global medical cannabis segment projected to grow 8-12%. Plant propagation revenue expected to follow seasonal patterns. Strong adjusted gross margins anticipated. Positive free cash flow expected. Conference call hosted on November 5, 2025 at 8:00 a.m. ET with CEO Miguel Martin and CFO Simona King.
